title: Namespace Claim Record
description: Schema for a namespace claim record, used to track canonical name registrations, ownership disputes, and deprecations.

claim_id.description: A unique identifier for the namespace claim request.

namespace.description: The requested canonical namespace. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

requester_id.description: The identifier of the user or organization requesting the namespace claim.

timestamp.description: The ISO-8601 formatted timestamp of when the claim was made.

status.description: The current status of the namespace claim request.

evidence_uri.description: An optional URI providing proof of trademark or ownership for the requested namespace.
